description_long: This shopping mall is a large, L-shaped commercial building with a flat roof and modern architectural features. The exterior is primarily composed of light gray and white walls, with sections of wood paneling and large glass windows, especially near the main entrance. The front facade features a prominent entrance with a canopy, flanked by landscaped areas and several trees. A spacious parking lot with marked spaces, including accessible parking and a small roundabout, surrounds the building on two sides. The mall is set within a landscaped plot, with green lawns and trees providing a buffer from the surrounding environment. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with clear access points and a welcoming public frontage.
description: A modern, L-shaped shopping mall with a flat roof, large glass windows, wood paneling, and a spacious parking lot surrounded by landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: The rear and side of the mall are visible, showing the flat roof, gray walls, and landscaped areas with trees.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the expansive parking lot, the L-shaped layout, and the landscaped perimeter with trees.
description_view_2: The front view displays the main entrance, large glass windows, wood paneling, and the parking lot with marked spaces and a roundabout.
description_view_3: A side perspective showing the secondary entrance, additional parking, and more of the landscaped surroundings.
attribute_storefront_signage: There is a rectangular sign above the main entrance with bold text and icons, likely illuminated, placed on a wood-paneled section. The signage is modern and clearly visible from the parking lot.
